text: Any blood alcohol concentration equivalence measuring device which connects to a motor vehicle ignition system and prevents a motor vehicle from being started without first determining through a deep lung breath sample that the operator’s equivalent breath alcohol level does not exceed the calibrated setting on the device as required by § 1198 (Installation and operation of ignition interlock devices) . * NB Repealed September 1, 2027
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 119-A — Ignition interlock device

Any blood alcohol concentration equivalence measuring device which connects to a motor vehicle ignition system and prevents a motor vehicle from being started without first determining through a deep lung breath sample that the operator’s equivalent breath alcohol level does not exceed the calibrated setting on the device as required by § 1198 (Installation and operation of ignition interlock devices) . * NB Repealed September 1, 2027

*Last modified: May 16, 2025*
